title: Planning, Dependencies, and Adaptive Decomposition · Durable Agent Mission
summary: A software modernization lead. The lead needs a persistent, checkpointed migration that can be paused, steered, resumed, and audited. Planned artifact: Deliver Persistent Repository Migration Goal with acceptance evidence, rubric defense, reflection, and a changed-constraint extension. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Write a goal as an outcome rather than an unbounded activity.
Set, view, edit, pause, resume, and clear a Codex persistent goal with the documented goal interface.
Order outcomes by prerequisite evidence rather than arbitrary file sequence.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

steps.title: Defend the stakeholder delivery

content.title: Evidence defense
